title: pelargonium ambiguum
intro: Pelargonium ambiguum is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, commonly known as the Cape pelargonium or ambiguum. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium ambiguum include relief from colds, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
